name: Steak on a Stick
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds london broil, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak on a diagonal into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Place the meat slices in a large ziplock bag.
3. Mix all other ingredients in a bowl.
4. Pour the marinade mixture into the bag with the meat slices, seal the bag without air pockets.
5. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or freeze until ready to use.
6. Skewer the meat in a ribbon style with 3-4 pieces on each skewer using bamboo skewers soaked in water.
7. Broil or grill the meat for 4-5 minutes on each side.
